members.name: Jensen Huang
members.title: CEO and Founder
members.bio: Co-founded NVIDIA. Leading the company's artificial intelligence and deep learning strategy. Pioneer in GPU computing and AI acceleration.

members.name: Mark Stevens
members.title: Lead Independent Director
members.bio: Partner at S-Cubed Capital. Extensive experience in technology ventures and digital transformation strategy.

members.name: Tench Coxe
members.title: Director
members.bio: Managing Director at Sutter Hill Ventures. Expertise in data science, analytics and AI investments.

members.name: Dawn Hudson
members.title: Director
members.bio: Former CMO at NFL. Experience in digital strategy and data-driven marketing.

members.name: Harvey Jones
members.title: Director
members.bio: Former CEO of Synopsys. Background in semiconductor design and machine learning hardware.

members.name: Michael McCaffery
members.title: Director
members.bio: CEO of Makena Capital Management. Experience with technology-focused investment strategies.

strategy_text: NVIDIA is the world leader in artificial intelligence computing. AI is central to our long-term strategy across data center, automotive, and edge computing. We continue to invest heavily in AI research and deep learning capabilities.
